subcodes.first_line: O my spiritual friends! It is the hour of the setting of the sun, and I am infinitely weary and powerless, despite this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران روحانی من وقت افول آفتابست و من بی نهایت خسته و ناتوان با وجود این
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
